_comment: MCP server registration read by Claude Code / Cowork when this repo is installed as a plugin. ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} expands to the plugin's install directory at launch, so the path resolves wherever the plugin lands. To run Digits as a bare MCP server outside the plugin system, replace the args path with an absolute path to server/digits_server.py (see the README). JSON has no native comments; this underscore-prefixed key is ignored by MCP clients.
